title: Hard-coded credentials are security-sensitive
description: This rule flags instances of hard-coded credentials used in database and LDAP connections. It looks for hard-coded credentials in connection strings, and for variable names that match any of the patterns from the provided list. It’s recommended to customize the configuration of this rule with additional credential words such as "oauthToken", "secret", … Credentials allow access to a sensitive component like a database, a file storage, an API or a service.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Hardcoded credentials detected - use environment variables or secure configuration
Hardcoded database credentials detected - use environment variables
Hardcoded authentication token detected - use secure storage
Hardcoded AWS credentials detected - use IAM roles or environment variables
